snippet.title: Tabaahi 🔥| Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria| Vishal Mishra, Raj Shekhar
snippet.description:
Tabaahi ❤️✨ — a melody that speaks straight to the heart.

Featuring Yash and Kiara Advani, this soulful track is beautifully sung and composed by Vishal Mishra. Let its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing melody stay with you long after the music ends. 🎶

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Tabaahi
Movie: Toxic
Vocal & Composition: Vishal Mishra
Lyrics: Raj Shekhar
Music Assistants: Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah & Kandarpa Kalita
Music Production: Vishal Mishra, Bitupon Boruah, Kandarpa Kalita & Trihangku Lahkar
Guitars: Kandarpa Kalita
Drums: Trihangku Lahkar
Synths: Kandarpa Kalita & Bitupon Boruah
Backing Vocals: Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah & Trihangku Lahkar
Brass & Woodwinds Arranged by: Vishal Mishra 
Dubbed in Prague by: Steve Ferry 
Vocal Dub Coordinator: Santhosh Venky
Recorded & Mixed by Trihangku Lahkar @VMS
Mastered by Dave Kutch at The Mastering Palace

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

𝗧𝗼 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 & 𝗗𝗼𝘄𝗻𝗹𝗼𝗮𝗱 𝗙𝘂𝗹𝗹 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴:
Spotify - https://bit.ly/40HGcWM
JioSaavn - https://bit.ly/4r64g0r
Gaana - https://bit.ly/4cj2wxf
iTunes - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Apple Music - https://apple.co/4b08NLV
Amazon Prime Music - https://amzn.to/4aIOT9n
YouTube Music - https://bit.ly/46A0DIV

Lyrics:
तोड़ो, सारे उसूलों को
छोड़ो, जाने दो भूलो को
तू हो बाहों में Aur  हर जगह तबाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Todo, Saare Usoolon Ko
Chhodo, Jaane Do Bhoolo Ko
Tu Ho Baahon Mein Aur Har Jagah Tabaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

ये लहर, ये हवा
कब चली पूछ के
रूह पे, क्यूँ भला
हो कोई बंदिशें
दुनिया के दस्तूर से आज ले रिहाई
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही ..

Yeh Lahar, Yeh Hawaa
Kab Chali Poochke
Rooh Pe, Kyun Bhala
Ho Koi Bandishein
Duniya Ke Dastoor Se Aaj Le Rihaayii
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

तू मुझे छील दे सांस की आग से
हर धड़क पे दोनो हो फना राख से
हर गलत सही-रेत पे लिखी गवाही
तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही तबाही

Tu Mujhe Chheel De, Saans Ki Aag Se
Har Dhadak Pe Dono Ho Fana Raakh Se
Har Galat Sahi- Ret Pe Likhi Gawaahi
Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi Tabaahi ..

#Tabaahi #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #KiaraAdvani

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026
 
Lyrics:

Intro
 
Chaha tha tune jisse Paaya kabhi na usse
 
Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…
 
( Music )
 
OOOOOOOOOO.. OOOOOOOOOO..
 
Verse 1
 
Dekha hai pehle kahin Aisa laga kyun usse
 
Shaayad mere dard se kahin Waqif laga woh mujhe
 
Marham laga zakhmon pe Raahat mili kuchh phirse
Dil ko sukoon milaa..haan milaaaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun, haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun…
 
(Music)
 
Tararareiyeee yeeeeee…
 
Verse 2
 
Aisi koi daastaan
Hai dil main uske kahin Zikr woh jiska kabhi magar Khud se bhi karta nahin
 
Rakhta chhupa ke sabse Bhulaa hai jaise rakh ke
Kal woh kahin apna…..apnaaa Aage hai teri marzi
 
Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun….haaye
 
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
 
Dil ishq karne chalaa kyun Hmmmmmm…..
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun

snippet.title: April DA7 - Menyala | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
#AprilMenyala #AprilDA7 #3dentertainment 


Menjadi seorang idola di usia muda adalah sesuatu yang tak pernah terbayangkan oleh April, remaja kelahiran Cirebon, 10 April 2011. Tumbuh dalam keluarga sederhana, April telah mengenal arti perjuangan sejak masih kecil. Demi membantu perekonomian keluarga, ia kerap menemani sang ayah mengamen dari satu tempat ke tempat lain. Dari jalanan itulah April mengasah kemampuan bernyanyinya sekaligus jatuh cinta pada musik dangdut.

Berbekal bakat, kerja keras, serta dukungan penuh dari kedua orang tuanya, pemilik nama lengkap Afriyani Mida Soleha ini memberanikan diri mengikuti ajang pencarian bakat Dangdut Academy 7. Penampilannya yang konsisten berhasil mencuri perhatian hingga akhirnya membawa April meraih posisi Juara 3.

Kini, langkah baru dalam perjalanan kariernya resmi dimulai. Bersama STREAM Entertainment sebagai manajemen dan 3D Entertainment sebagai label rekaman, April memperkenalkan single perdananya yang berjudul "Menyala", yang resmi dirilis pada 9 Juli 2026.
Mulai pukul 00.00 WIB, lagu "Menyala" sudah dapat dinikmati di berbagai platform musik digital, seperti Apple Music, Spotify, YouTube Music, TikTok, dan Facebook Music. Sementara itu, video musiknya tayang pada hari yang sama pukul 16.00 WIB melalui kanal YouTube 3D Entertainment.

Menariknya, lagu "Menyala" ditulis langsung oleh Charly van Houten yang terinspirasi dari perjalanan hidup April. Melalui liriknya, Charly mencoba menggambarkan perjuangan seorang anak yang sejak kecil telah berusaha membantu keluarganya hingga akhirnya mampu menggapai impian.

"Liriknya saya tulis kurang lebih dari kisah hidupnya April. Dari kecil dia sudah berjuang membantu orang tua, dan sekarang di usia yang masih sangat muda dia berhasil ada di titik ini. Ibaratnya dari belum ada cahaya, sekarang April sudah menyala," ungkap Charly van Houten.

Bagi April, proses rekaman menjadi pengalaman yang tak akan pernah dilupakan. Setelah bertahun-tahun bernyanyi di jalanan, kini ia akhirnya merasakan berada di dalam studio rekaman untuk merekam karya pertamanya.

"Aduh, aku senang banget akhirnya punya single. Terharu banget. Dulu biasa nyanyi di jalanan, sekarang aku bisa nyanyi di studio rekaman. Bismillah, semoga lagunya bisa diterima semua orang," ujar April dengan penuh haru.

"Menyala" bukan sekadar lagu debut, tetapi juga menjadi simbol perjalanan, harapan, dan mimpi seorang anak yang tak pernah menyerah pada keadaan. Semoga karya perdana April dapat menjadi penyemangat bagi banyak orang untuk terus berjuang menggapai impian, sekaligus menjadi awal dari perjalanan panjangnya dalam mewarnai industri musik dangdut Indonesia.
------------------------------------------

الكلمات | Lyrics



جابـك الله ياحبيبي يوم فيـك الحظ قـام
أنت وحدك تلفت النظره وهو اللـي أبيه 

جيتنـي حبـاً عفيف وجيت لك كلي هيام 
وكل يوم أسأل ضميري بين كيف وبين ليه

معك رافقت السعاده ذقت من طعم الغرام
يـ الوليف اللي مَلك قلبي غرامـه وأهتويـه 

ضعت فيك ولاحدن قبلك خذا مني إهتمام
أنت ذاك اللي سنين العمر طافت وأحتريه

نـوّر الكـون بـعيـوني وأنجلـى ذاك الظـلام
أنت نور دروبـي اللي دلّنـي يوم أهتديـه 

المشـاعـر فـي وصـالك ياحبـيـبي ما تـلام 
يا أجمل أشيائي الجميله مالك بغيرك شبيه

في حضورك يا منايه تضحك الدنيـا سـلام
ولو تغيب شـوي عنـي المحك بين الوجيه 

ما تفـارقنـي ثواني حتـى فـ أحلام المنام 
كل يوم أبدا غلاك اللي عسانـي ما أنتهيه

لك بـقلبي حب عذري ولك تقدير ومقـام 
يابعد عينـي وروحي قلبـي اللي محتويه 

ومايـوفيـك القـصيـد ولا يـوفيـك الكـلام 
كل بيت ٍ لجل عينك أكتبـه وأبدعت فيه

جابـك الله ياحبيبي يوم فيـك الحظ قـام
أنت وحدك تلفت النظره وهو اللـي أبيه 

جيتنـي حبـاً عفيف وجيت لك كلي هيام 
وكل يوم أسأل ضميري بين كيف وبين ليه

معك رافقت السعاده ذقت من طعم الغرام
يـ الوليف اللي مَلك قلبي غرامـه وأهتويـه 

ضعت فيك ولاحدن قبلك خذا مني إهتمام
أنت ذاك اللي سنين العمر طافت وأحتريه

نـوّر الكـون بـعيـوني وأنجلـى ذاك الظـلام
أنت نور دروبـي اللي دلّنـي يوم أهتديـه 

المشـاعـر فـي وصـالك ياحبـيـبي ما تـلام 
يا أجمل أشيائي الجميله مالك بغيرك شبيه

في حضورك يا منايه تضحك الدنيـا سـلام
ولو تغيب شـوي عنـي المحك بين الوجيه 

ما تفـارقنـي ثواني حتـى فـ أحلام المنام 
كل يوم أبدا غلاك اللي عسانـي ما أنتهيه

لك بـقلبي حب عذري ولك تقدير ومقـام 
يابعد عينـي وروحي قلبـي اللي محتويه 

ومايـوفيـك القـصيـد ولا يـوفيـك الكـلام 
كل بيت ٍ لجل عينك أكتبـه وأبدعت فيه

snippet.title: Yousif Spark x Faisal Majrashi – Ya Khasarni | أغنية “يا خاسرني” | يوسف سبارك و فيصل مجرشي
snippet.description:
‘'

كلمات و الحان : فيصل مجرشي
كلمات الراب : يوسف سبارك

Prod By: LP x NIGHTA
Flute : Shuvajit ​⁠- India
Saxophone : Gabriel - Nigeria
Coral : NSR - نسر
Mix & Master : Yousif Spark

Executive Supervision : N8A
Music Video by : La Perla Production
Digital Distribution : Alfan Music


الكلمات 💭:

مرة صدفة لاقيته
من نظرة حبيته
في قلبي خليته
جنني يخرب بيته

ما افكر الا فيه
كل وقتي ابيه
والله ما اخليه
اموت انا عليه


بهل صدفة جنني
حبيته و عذبني
يا خلي ارحمني
ابعد و فارقني 

صدقني صدقني
بعدك بيريحني
كنت انا متعني
بحب خاذلني

انا غير
فارق عنهم ماشي عكس السير
ما بتلقى لي شبيه
و الي خسرني خسر شيء كبير

ما تعوضني الايام و بكرة بيبان
وتفهم ليه ، سديت كل البيبان
ما عاد بها رجعة، ولو صدفة تلاقينا 
تخطى ولا تقولي سلام 

الي راح راح ، شبعت انا منك جراح
قربك عذاب اخيرا برتاح 
لا تطلب سماح
خلاص .. الي راح راح

لا لا 
لا لا ترجع لي
ابعد يا خاسرني
من بعدك متهني
قربك مو لازمني

كنت انت حارمني
من كل شيء و مني 
تعتمد تضايقني
اخ يا متعبتي

snippet.title: Something Won't Let You Leave...
snippet.description:
Something Won't Let You Leave...

And it's something horrifying.

Verity's voice actor: ‪@JustWhispy  
Special thanks to @GroxMC for accepting to be in the vid!

Watch my videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/033vHZW7F2GVDiC44bHwfj

Shoutout to:
@itsfilsfr - Verity helpline voice actor
@peaktownmc - made the laboratory machine model
@9meoww - helped me with animations
@HeroHayden47 - helped Whispy with voicelines

This is part 3 of the Minecraft Verity Series:
I built a way out, and it let me believe it. Every wire led to an escape. Every calculation said it would work. And the second it mattered, I found out it only ever worked one way.

NO, you CANNOT publish mods, sell merch, or do anything commercial about Verity before asking me first.

NO,  you CANNOT repost dubbed versions of my videos. If you dubbed them, email me and I might add it as an official audio track.

Video - 0:28 - 24:39
Outro - 24:39 - 24:48

This video is a horror short film, it uses scripted editing and sounds to add the main entity in video. THERE IS NO MOD.
